rationale_top3: Nature & Location: Strong nature score (18/20) and solid location score (10/15) indicate excellent natural surroundings and prime positioning in Gippsland Cleanliness Standards: Above-average cleanliness score (11/15) demonstrates well-maintained facilities and grounds Good Value Proposition: Strong value score (10/15) suggests reasonable pricing for the quality and amenities offered

kids_play: Basic playground and entertainment facilities available with moderate activity options
pet_detail: Pets permitted with moderate pet-friendly score (5/10) suggesting some restrictions or limited pet facilities may apply
best_for: Nature-loving families, Gippsland explorers, those seeking peaceful coastal/lakeside settings
